hero.title: Warm Algarve evenings, shaped by fire, wine and time.
hero.subtitle: A family table in Almancil where Mediterranean calm meets the generosity of picanha, Portuguese wine and long conversations that continue into the evening.
hero.sideText: Close to Quinta do Lago and Vale do Lobo, rooted in the relaxed rhythm of the Algarve.

intro.title: A restaurant with the confidence to feel calm, generous and unmistakably local.
intro.body: Restaurante Figueiral brings together the warmth of a family dining room, the glow of the grill and the quiet refinement of a place that has welcomed locals and travellers for decades.

highlights: Portuguese wine chosen for long conversations

statement.text: The atmosphere is not staged. It is built slowly: one welcome, one bottle, one evening at a time.
statement.caption: Almancil hospitality, carried with patience since 1986

meat.title: Fire, rhythm and generosity, served without spectacle.
meat.body: The house signature remains Brazilian-style picanha: precise, abundant and deeply convivial. It is a premium meat experience, but the feeling is warmer than formal.
meat.note: The grill gives the evening its pulse; the room keeps it relaxed.

wine.title: Bottles chosen for conversation rather than display.
wine.body: From Portuguese icons to quiet discoveries, wine at Figueiral is there to lengthen the evening: pairing with fire, softening the pace and giving each table its own rhythm.
wine.note: A list for regulars, travellers, celebrations and those who prefer to be guided.

legacy.title: Longevity, here, is not nostalgia. It is the luxury of being trusted.
legacy.body: Figueiral has grown through consistency: familiar faces, returning families, attentive service and the kind of welcome that feels polished without becoming distant.

terrace.title: An Algarve evening with room to breathe.
terrace.body: Warm light, attentive service and the ease of Almancil create a dining atmosphere close to Quinta do Lago and Vale do Lobo that feels international, but never anonymous.

cta.title: Reserve a table for fire, wine and an unhurried Algarve evening.
cta.body: For romantic dinners, family celebrations and guests staying near Almancil, Quinta do Lago or Vale do Lobo.

reviews.title: Long-standing hospitality, remembered long after the evening ends.

items.quote: A timeless Algarve restaurant with exceptional picanha, warm service and a beautiful atmosphere.
items.author: Recent guest

items.quote: Elegant, relaxed and consistently excellent. A must when staying near Quinta do Lago or Vale do Lobo.
items.author: International traveller

items.quote: A family dining institution in Almancil where hospitality is treated as seriously as the food.
items.author: Algarve dining guide

intro.title: A family restaurant shaped by loyalty, service and the Algarve way of hosting.
intro.body: Figueiral has grown through consistency: welcoming regular guests, international travellers and local families with the same care, warmth and attention to detail.

feature.title: Premium does not need to feel distant. Here, elegance still has a human voice.
feature.body: The philosophy is simple: excellent products, attentive service, relaxed confidence and a dining room that makes guests want to return year after year.

cards.title: Service excellence
cards.body: Attentive without being formal, polished without losing warmth.

cards.title: Long-term loyalty
cards.body: A restaurant remembered by families, returning travellers and local guests.

cards.title: Algarve atmosphere
cards.body: Mediterranean ease, evening light and an elegant relaxed rhythm in Almancil.

intro.title: A premium Algarve menu built around fire, produce and generous hospitality.
intro.body: The menu is structured for a refined dining experience and ready to be connected to a CMS. Dishes are shown as indexable HTML for stronger search visibility.

hero.title: The menu begins with the rhythm of the grill.

intro.title: A wine restaurant in the Algarve where pairing feels personal, not performative.
intro.body: The wine service at Figueiral is built around the table: what guests are celebrating, what they are eating and how the evening should unfold.

feature.title: Portuguese depth, Mediterranean brightness and bottles for memorable evenings.
feature.body: The list is imagined for expressive pairings with fire-grilled meat, Brazilian-style picanha, Algarve seafood and relaxed hospitality.
